What entities are present and what are they doing in the outdoor group scenes?
canonical_answer: A group of people dance on a paved outdoor surface wearing dark t-shirts. Several individuals have white paint covering their faces completely. Specific shirts display large white letters like U or vertical text. Some participants wear baseball caps or beanies on their heads. One person wears a black face covering while others remain uncovered.

question: Describe the sequence of actions during the initial spa treatment scene.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a person with a colorful headscarf lies with a white mask and one cucumber slice; at 4s, gloved hands place a second cucumber slice over the other eye; at 6s, a gloved hand touches the face while the mouth opens expressively showing teeth.

question: Outline the visual changes observed in the later shots of the video.
canonical_answer: At 14s, a person with dark hair and a hoop earring tilts their head wearing a white mask; at 15s, the white substance covers the cheeks, nose, chin, and forehead completely; at 18s, a person with red lips and a colorful garment appears with cucumber slices over eyes.
